ab: ’o nanghia’u zou pasuya, zou maezo oko no cou to psoseongana.
ch: 我的好朋友叫pasuya，他也是鄒族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is pasuya, and he is also an Cou child.

ab: lamia iepoepohʉ toatmopsʉ to you ne saviki.
ch: 我們一起在山美部落讀書。
en: We study together in the saviki tribe.

ab: lamia asngʉcʉ iepoepohʉ tma’lʉ to mameoi hola ehohamo, lamia acʉhʉ na’no melʉ bua cou.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說鄒語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Cou proficiently.

ab: mi’o na’no bankake ho maezo na’no noyʉnʉ, mita na ’no putisi ’e pasuya ho maezo na ’no kʉehoi.
ch: 我很高也很胖，pasuya很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while pasuya is short and thin.

ab: mo na’ no peiseayayokeo ’o pasuya, la toehunga ʉmnʉa.
ch: pasuya很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: pasuya is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
